data_elements: Name, email, date of birth, gender, country
Password hashes, MFA tokens, session logs
Assessment responses, risk scores, wellness metrics, health condition self-reports
justification: Clinical validity requirements — longitudinal health trend analysis requires minimum 5-year data window per clinical advisory board recommendation (CAB-2024-008)

data_elements: Self-reported conditions, medications, allergies, lifestyle habits
Feature access logs, session duration, assessment module completion
Invoice history, subscription changes, payment method tokens (Stripe)
Ticket content, chat transcripts, email correspondence
Opt-in/opt-out status, consent timestamps, consent version
retention_period: 24 months after consent withdrawal or account closure

data_elements: Anonymized assessment data, survey responses, research consent records
deletion_method: Manual deletion with ethics board approval

data_elements: API logs, error traces, audit trail
